evals.prompt: I need a list of Chicago dentists from Google Maps with business details, but I do not need email or phone enrichment yet.
evals.expected_output: Primary recommendation should stay on the local-business track and favor Google Maps Scraper without unnecessarily adding Contact Details Scraper.

evals.prompt: Please help me get New York restaurant leads and also pull their first batch of Google Maps reviews so I can compare them.
evals.expected_output: Primary workflow should be Google Maps Scraper -> Google Maps Reviews Scraper, with reviews treated as enrichment rather than discovery.

evals.prompt: I want US SaaS companies for outreach, but right now I only need company pages and websites, not emails.
evals.expected_output: Request should route to b2b-company-leads and recommend Google Search Scraper as the primary option.

evals.prompt: Find me US SaaS company leads with email addresses and phone numbers for outbound sales.
evals.expected_output: Request should route to b2b-company-leads and recommend Google Search Email Finder (Premium) instead of Google Search Scraper.

evals.prompt: I already have a CSV of company websites and want to enrich them with contact info like email and phone.
evals.expected_output: The skill should recognize a website-only enrichment request and prioritize Contact Details Scraper directly.

evals.prompt: I need German local business leads from a directory source, preferably something more local than Google Maps.
evals.expected_output: The skill should turn on regional routing and recommend a Germany-specific directory workflow such as Gelbe Seiten or 11880 rather than only core English/global templates.

evals.prompt: I need Tokyo salon leads and the site is Japanese, so use a Japan-friendly workflow.
evals.expected_output: The skill should load regional templates and recommend a Japan-specific option such as Itown or the Japan Google Maps variant.

evals.prompt: Find agencies on Clutch for me. I only need discovery and company listing details for now.
evals.expected_output: The skill should route to b2b-company-leads and recommend Clutch Scraper (Company Listing) as a directory-style B2B discovery template.

evals.prompt: Which Octoparse template should I use for Los Angeles salon leads if I just want a recommendation and don't want to run anything yet?
evals.expected_output: The skill should prefer quick answer mode and recommend a narrow local-business workflow, most likely Google Maps Scraper, without creating or running a task.

evals.prompt: Set up an Octoparse task for me to find US SaaS companies with email addresses, but don't run it yet.
evals.expected_output: The skill should prefer task setup mode and select Google Search Email Finder (Premium), moving toward task creation without defaulting to execution.

evals.prompt: Please run a quick test for Chicago dental clinics and show me a few sample rows so I can confirm the data looks right.
evals.expected_output: The skill should prefer run and sample mode, stay on the local-business track, and lean toward a Google Maps based workflow with a short sample-oriented execution path.

evals.prompt: I need an export-ready lead dataset for New York restaurants with enough fields to deliver to my team.
evals.expected_output: The skill should prefer export-ready mode, choose a local-business workflow, and describe a run that reaches a ready-for-export or full-retrieval state rather than stopping at recommendation only.

evals.prompt: I already have a batch of 11880.com detail URLs and want the enriched German business details from them.
evals.expected_output: The skill should enable regional routing and recommend 11880.com Detail Scraper directly instead of a broader discovery template.

evals.prompt: I need French association emails from a directory source, not a general Google Search workflow.
evals.expected_output: The skill should route to b2b-company-leads with regional directory logic and recommend Helloasso Association Emails Scraper instead of the default Google Search templates.
